why_this_milestone_exists.purpose: Record the detailed route trace added after policy_v6 stabilized the 200-point Kangaroo plateau.
why_this_milestone_exists.trigger: The previous milestone showed stable 200-point behavior but not why the policy failed after the reward event.

post_reward.dominant_behavior: The policy stays around the x=132 ladder/top area after the reward rather than transitioning to the next route.

interpretation: The stable 200-point behavior is a single RIGHTFIRE reward event near a monkey at x≈143,y≈157, while the player is at x≈132,y≈148.
After the reward, the policy reaches or remains near x≈132,y≈132 and does not make useful post-reward route progress.
The life loss occurs when a falling coconut reaches almost the same position as the player: falling coconut x≈133,y≈129 while the player is x≈132,y≈132.

The next paid LLM run should not merely optimize the first 200 points. It should preserve the first reward, then explicitly step/jump out of the x≈132 falling-coconut column and target the next route.

code_changes_after_analysis.change: Added a reusable Kangaroo route tracer that records action, reward, score, lives, player state, nearby ladders, and nearby hazards for a selected rollout window.
Added trace-derived Kangaroo prompt and feedback guidance for the post-200 falling-coconut failure.

rq_relevance.RQ1: Clarifies that the current Kangaroo policy reliably achieves one reward event but has not solved the route.
rq_relevance.RQ2: Strongly relevant: the trace prevents overinterpreting the score and explains the behavioral shortcut/plateau.

next_steps.step: Use the route trace in the next Kangaroo prompt or feedback before any paid continuation.
next_steps.why: The known bottleneck is now concrete: after the 200-point RIGHTFIRE event, avoid staying at x≈132,y≈132 until a falling coconut hits.

next_steps.step: If continuing Kangaroo, resume from policy_v6 and constrain the LLM to preserve the first reward while changing only post-reward transition and hazard handling.
next_steps.why: policy_v6 is stable at 200; broad rewrites risk losing the useful first-event behavior.

next_steps.step: If the next targeted attempt still plateaus at 200, freeze Kangaroo as partial coverage and move to another game.
next_steps.why: The thesis goal is broader game coverage, not unlimited spending on one game.
